summary: Fixed 4 🔴 blockers + 2 🟡 from code-review run_1. (B1) Centralized SESSION_SECRET sign/verify in api/_session.ts — prod now throws if unset, non-prod falls back; callback/me/share all route through it so issuer and verifiers cannot drift. (B2) GitHubAdapter cache keys now prefixed with user login resolved via /api/auth/me; setUserScope() clears cache on identity change; useAuth.logout() calls clearMemCache(). (B3) OAuth scope dropped from `read:user repo` → `read:user`; EmptyOnboarding documents `gh repo create --public`; 403 INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE now carries a friendly message pointing at repo visibility. (B4) Share password moved from URL query to POST JSON body; GET on password-protected share returns 401 PASSWORD_REQUIRED; Access-Control-Allow-Origin:* only on GET (public read); SharePage frontend POSTs on submit. (S2) OAuth state uses crypto.randomBytes(16).toString('hex'). (S4) logout cookie attrs match login (HttpOnly + SameSite=Lax + Secure-in-prod). All 310 unit tests pass; lint + typecheck clean.

openIssues.title: No per-user rate-limit on /api/articles/*
openIssues.note: Deferred — needs Vercel KV wiring, out of scope for run_2.

openIssues.title: Error taxonomy: 401 (revoked) and 403 (rate-limit) still collapse to INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE
openIssues.note: Partial mitigation: 403 now carries friendlier message. Full branching on x-ratelimit-remaining deferred.

openIssues.title: access_token stored plaintext inside JWT (base64-only, not encrypted)
openIssues.note: Deferred — requires AES-GCM or server-side session store. Cookie is httpOnly+Secure, so leak surface is proxy/log misconfig only.

openIssues.title: Share creation does not run isSafeArticlePath on user-supplied articlePath
openIssues.note: Not yet addressed in run_2; defense-in-depth, contained to user's own repo.

verification.grep_logex-dev-secret: only in api/_session.ts definition + test fixture
